title: Didymoglossum melanopus
taxonomy: Didymoglossum melanopus is classified within the family Hymenophyllaceae, which is a family of ferns commonly known as the filmy ferns. This family is part of the larger division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns. The genus Didymoglossum is a group of epiphytic ferns, and D. melanopus is one of its species. The species is further classified as a member of the order Hymenophyllales. The classification of D. melanopus reflects its unique characteristics and its place within the larger fern family.
